programme.title: Evening Hits of Praise

programme.desc: Reflective Christian Pop ballads and worship music to unwind late at night.

programme.title: Creating a 5-Star Stay
programme.desc: Valentina’s mission: style her big sister’s lakeside guest house with signature House of Valentina flair. Armed with Amazon finds, can she win her sister’s approval and deliver a luxury 5-star stay? Shop what you see with the Amazon shopping app! Just type "Shop the Show" in the search bar on mobile to get started.

programme.title: The Art of the Guest Room
programme.desc: Faced with awkward windows and tough sightlines, Valentina reimagines the guest bedroom using curated art to guide the eye and define the space. With clever styling and personal touches, she turns this design challenge into something truly beautiful. Shop what you see with the Amazon shopping app! Just type "Shop the Show" in the search bar on mobile to get started.

programme.title: Small Room, Big Problems
programme.desc: With momentum on her side, Valentina dives into the final bedroom - only to find herself seriously challenged once the furniture rolls in. Can she rethink every inch to prove that small spaces can still serve up serious style? Shop what you see with the Amazon shopping app! Just type "Shop the Show" in the search bar on mobile to get started.

programme.title: Double Design Challenge
programme.desc: From spa-worthy serenity to hardworking utility, Valentina tackles two very different bathrooms with one goal: elevate the everyday. But when pressure builds and design doubts creep in, can she get the design done with signature House of Valentina style? Shop what you see with the Amazon shopping app! Just type "Shop the Show" in the search bar on mobile to get started.

programme.title: Cooking Up A Luxe Kitchen
programme.desc: The kitchen heats up as Valentina must choose between style and function, while weighing whether her decision will meet her sister’s expectations. Shop what you see with the Amazon shopping app! Just type "Shop the Show" in the search bar on mobile to get started.

programme.title: Key Kitchen Solutions
programme.desc: With the kitchen nearly complete, Valentina focuses on the details that make daily life feel luxurious. From smart storage to splurge-worthy appliances, she balances beauty and functionality. Shop what you see with the Amazon shopping app! Just type "Shop the Show" in the search bar on mobile to get started.

programme.title: Family Room Made Fabulous
programme.desc: Valentina takes on the biggest space yet - the Living Room. With additional family pitching in, it’s all laughter and teamwork, until a key piece of furniture is compromised. Can she recover in time to keep the room - and the project - on track? Shop what you see with the Amazon shopping app! Just type "Shop the Show" in the search bar on mobile to get started.

programme.title: Brainy Bargains: Top Deals Today!
programme.desc: Deal expert Brainy Bargains breaks down the latest and greatest deals. Shop while you watch: just head to the Amazon shopping app on mobile and type "shop the show" in the search bar!

programme.title: Think Outside the Kitchen
programme.desc: New mom Stephanie loves cooking and gets inspiration from India. Ellen's determined to help this young family!

programme.title: Organization Over Everything
programme.desc: Andrew and Leah's home has a kitchen that feels out of place. Ellen pushes it to the limit on a small budget.

programme.desc: Laura and James' tiny kitchen is bursting at the seams with five kids. Ellen gets creative to maximize space.

programme.desc: Susan and Brad's kitchen could use an update. Ellen needs to convince them that change can be a good thing.

programme.title: 1776 - 2026 250th Anniversary Quarter Celebration Program
programme.desc: 2026 will be one of the most historic years ever in U.S. coinage. Join your host Mike Mezack to learn about the incredible U.S. Quarter program and get a chance at an exclusive set!

programme.title: 1776 USA Gold Rarity
programme.desc: Secure a 1oz Gold 1776-2026 American Gold Eagle graded PF70UCAM in a 1 of 250 Holder, honoring 250 years of American Freedom! Included as a bonus is a free 2026 1oz Silver Eagle also featuring the iconic Liberty Bell to create a one of a kind pair!

programme.title: 1776 USA Gold Rarity
programme.desc: Secure a 1oz Gold 1776-2026 American Gold Eagle graded PF70UCAM in a 1 of 250 Holder, honoring 250 years of American Freedom! Included as a bonus is a free 2026 1oz Silver Eagle also featuring the iconic Liberty Bell to create a one of a kind pair!

programme.title: 1776 Rare Silver
programme.desc: Celebrate the 250th Anniversary of the USA with the limited edition dual date 1776-2026 Liberty Bell Privy Silver Eagle graded perfect PF70UCAM with the First Day of Issue designation. Limited to just 500,000 examples, this is a one of a kind rarity!

programme.desc: Breaking news, live events and stories taking place across the nation.

programme.desc: Late-breaking news events and top stories of the day are updated by the FOX 35 Nightly News Team.

programme.title: FOX 35 News
